samples.xml_description:
<module id="fsm">
    <description>Implement a Mealy FSM detection circuit that detects a single-bit input IN. When the input is 10011, output MATCH is 1, and MATCH is 0 in other cases. Support for continuous input and loop detection.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="IN">Input signal to the FSM.</input>
        <input id="CLK">Clock signal used for synchronous operation.</input>
        <input id="RST">Reset signal to initialize the FSM.</input>
        <output id="MATCH">Output signal indicating a match condition based on the FSM state.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter id="S0">Initial state of the FSM.</parameter>
        <parameter id="S1">State of the FSM when the input is 1.</parameter>
        <parameter id="S2">State of the FSM when the input is 0.</parameter>
        <parameter id="S3">State of the FSM when the input is 1.</parameter>
        <parameter id="S4">State of the FSM when the input is 1.</parameter>
        <parameter id="S5">State of the FSM when the input is 0.</parameter>
        <parameter id="S6">State of the FSM when the input is 0.</parameter>
        <parameter id="S7">State of the FSM when the input is 1.</parameter>
        <parameter id="S8">State of the FSM when the input is 1.</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <reg id="state" type="sequential_logic">Current state of the FSM.</reg>
        <reg id="next_state" type="sequential_logic">Next state of the FSM.</reg>
        <reg id="match_reg" type="sequential_logic">Register to store the MATCH output.</reg>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        <sequential_logic>
            <always>
                <trigger>
                    <input id="IN" description="Input signal to the FSM." />
                    <input id="CLK" description="Clock signal used for synchronous operation." />
                    <input id="RST" description="Reset signal to initialize the FSM." />
                </trigger>
                <action>
                    <if>
                        <condition>
                            <input id="RST" />
                        </condition>
                        <then>
                            <set>
                                <output id="MATCH" value="0" />
                            </set>
                        </then>
                    </if>
                    <else>
                        <set>
                            <output id="MATCH" value="match_reg" />
                        </set>
                    </else>
                </action>
            </always>
            <always>
                <trigger>
                    <input id="CLK" description="Clock signal used for synchronous operation." />
                    <input id="RST" description="Reset signal to initialize the FSM." />
                </trigger>
                <action>
                    <if>
                        <condition>
                            <input id="RST" />
                        </condition>
                        <then>
                            <set>
                                <output id="state" value="S0" />
                            </set>
                        </then>
                    </if>
                    <else>
                        <set>
                            <output id="state" value="next_state" />
                        </set>
                    </else>
                </action>
            </always>
        </sequential_logic>
        <combinational_logic>
            <always>
                <trigger>
                    <input id="state" description="Current state of the FSM." />
                    <input id="IN" description="Input signal to the FSM." />
                </trigger>
                <action>
                    <case>
                        <condition>
                            <input id="state" />
                        </condition>
                        <when>
                            <condition>
                                <parameter id="S0" />
                            </condition>
                            <then>
                                <set>
                                    <output id="next_state" value="S1" />
                                    <output id="match_reg" value="0" />
                                </set>
                            </then>
                        </when>
                        <when>
                            <condition>
                                <parameter id="S1" />
                            </condition>
                            <then>
                                <set>
                                    <output id="next_state" value="S2" />
                                    <output id="match_reg" value="0" />
                                </set>
                            </then>
                        </when>
                        <when>
                            <condition>
                                <parameter id="S2" />
                            </condition>
                            <then>
                                <set>
                                    <output id="next_state" value="S3" />
                                    <output id="match_reg" value="0" />
                                </set>
                            </then>
                        </when>
                        <when>
                            <condition>
                                <parameter id="S3" />
                            </condition>
                            <then>
                                <set>
                                    <output id="next_state" value="S4" />
                                    <output id="match_reg" value="0" />
                                </set>
                            </then>
                        </when>
                        <when>
                            <condition>
                                <parameter id="S4" />
                            </condition>
                            <then>
                                <set>
                                    <output id="next_state" value="S0" />
                                    <output id="match_reg" value="IN" />
                                </set>
                            </then>
                        </when>
                        <when>
                            <condition>
                                <parameter id="S5" />
                            </condition>
                            <then>
                                <set>
                                    <output id="next_state" value="S0" />
                                    <output id="match_reg" value="0" />
                                </set>
                            </then>
                        </when>
                        <when>
                            <condition>
                                <parameter id="S6" />
                            </condition>
                            <then>
                                <set>
                                    <output id="next_state" value="S0" />
                                    <output id="match_reg" value="0" />
                                </set>
                            </then>
                        </when>
                        <when>
                            <condition>
                                <parameter id="S7" />
                            </condition>
                            <then>
                                <set>
                                    <output id="next_state" value="S0" />
                                    <output id="match_reg" value="IN" />
                                </set>
                            </then>
                        </when>
                        <when>
                            <condition>
                                <parameter id="S8" />
                            </condition>
                            <then>
                                <set>
                                    <output id="next_state" value="S0" />
                                    <output id="match_reg" value="0" />
                                </set>
                            </then>
                        </when>
                    </case>
                </action>
            </always>
        </combinational_logic>
    </implementation>
</module>
